headline: Putrajaya Green City Misses 8 of 12 Sustainability Targets
context: Audit of Putrajaya green city commitments found capital missed targets on 8 of 12 sustainability indicators from 2015 plan.

cards.big: Putrajaya missed 8 of 12 green city targets from 2015 plan
cards.sub: Malaysia planned green capital struggles with car dependency and energy waste

cards.big: Public transport mode share reached only 8% versus 30% target
cards.sub: Car dependency persists as bus routes cover only 45% of residential areas

cards.big: Building energy efficiency improved only 12% against 40% reduction target
cards.sub: Government offices account for 78% of Putrajaya electricity consumption

cards.big: Green space per capita at 22 sqm exceeds the 20 sqm target
cards.sub: One of only 4 indicators met but maintenance budget cuts threaten upkeep

cards.big: Green city failure tests whether sustainability targets translate into actual policy change
Putrajaya missed 8 of 12 green targets. A green city label requires measured outcomes, not aspirations.
